title: K-200 Payload Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Payload Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-473-H. Revision: H. Type: ICD. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2024-02-03. Last modified: 2024-11-04. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1089, P-1145, P-1129, P-1083.
